rows.label: qev040106_MSG0001
rows.name:
Mo-mo-mo?
Do you have some business with the Dopang Caravan-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040106_MSG0002
rows.name:
You're looking for a Nopon who came from NLA?
Hmmm...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040106_MSG0003
rows.name:
Come to think of it, a cute Nopon with a servant
said she was heading to the Black Steel Continent-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040106_MSG0004
rows.name:
She left quite a while ago,
so she should be arriving right about now-mo.[ST:wait ]
